title: Suspended Railways/Monorail
description: Ride the skies! This mod adds a fully standalone suspended railway to minecraft - (no create addon, or vanilla rails needed). It comes with special rails, supportive blocks and crafting recipes.
body:
# **Suspended Railway Mod**

**Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kJPJxqEpO8g**

Bring futuristic transportation to your world with the Suspended Railway Mod! This mod adds a fully independent suspended railway system that works completely on its own — it is no Create Mod addon, and no vanilla minecarts or rails are needed to build it.

Designed to be fully survival-friendly, every block and item comes with crafting recipes.

This mod is inspired by Germanys Suspended Railway System (Wuppertaler Schwebebahn).
Features:

    ✅ **Custom Rail Classes**
    Specially designed rail types that only work with the suspended railway system.

    ✅ **Exclusive Railcar**
    A unique suspended railcar, which hangs under its rail construction. It can only operate on the mod’s custom rails.

    ✅ **Structural Blocks**
    Includes steel beams and rail construction blocks to build realistic and independent suspended track systems.

    ✅ Perfect for Cities & Futuristic Builds
    Ideal for building skylines, industrial areas, metros, and elevated transport systems.

## **Blocks & Items:**

 

_Suspended Rail_ - New rail type, based of a powered rail. It works only with the Suspended Railcar and is specifically designed for it.

_Curved Rails_: as the name suggest: to build curves you need to craft curved rails seperately!

_Railconstruction_: A block specifically designed for the new rail types. Suspended and Curved Rails can only be placed on the Railconstruction block. No additional redstone needed, the block powers the rails automatically.

_Steelbeam_: A decorative block that can be used to support the rail construction, but only optionally.

_Wheelset_: special Item which is needed to craft a suspended railcar.

_Suspended Railcar_: new entity, based of a minecart, but hangs underneath its rails. It has to be placed on a suspended rail, then automatically adjusts underneath it. IMPORTANT: To enter it you need to click near its roof, hitbox is relatively high up.

_________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Dependencies (in order for the mod to work):

- u-team-core (by HyCraftHD)

(https://modrinth.com/mod/u-team-core)

 

This mod is forge-only (currently only 1.20.1 as well) 

Right now, i am not planning to port this mod to fabric or higher mc-versions.
